result.sentence: The dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" in Genshin Impact is part of a limited-time event recipe and is obtained through steps tied to that specific event.
The dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" is not in the permanent recipe pool in Genshin Impact.
The dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" is typically available during certain seasonal events in Liyue in Genshin Impact, often around the Mid-Autumn Festival period in-game.
Update Genshin Impact to the latest version.
Confirm that the relevant limited-time event for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" is currently active in Genshin Impact.
Join the event questline in Genshin Impact where you interact with Liyue NPCs who are hosting a tea and food celebration.
Progress through the event questline in Genshin Impact until you unlock the cooking challenge or the recipe rewards.
The recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" is usually given as a quest reward or made available through the event shop in Genshin Impact.
If the recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" is in the event shop in Genshin Impact, collect the required event currency.
Complete daily event challenges, mini-games, or combat domains in Genshin Impact to earn the event currency needed for the event shop.
Obtain the "Fine Tea, Full Moon" recipe in Genshin Impact either by receiving it as a quest reward or by purchasing it from the event shop.
Open the Inventory menu in Genshin Impact.
Navigate to the Precious Items tab in the Inventory menu in Genshin Impact.
Select the "Fine Tea, Full Moon" recipe item in the Precious Items tab in Genshin Impact.
Click Use on the "Fine Tea, Full Moon" recipe item in Genshin Impact to learn the recipe.
Obtain Tea Leaves, the event-exclusive ingredient for "Fine Tea, Full Moon", by earning them during the event in Genshin Impact.
Obtain Sugar by purchasing it from General Goods Shops in Genshin Impact.
Obtain Lotus Heads by collecting them near lakes and rivers in the Liyue region in Genshin Impact.
Obtain Milk by purchasing it from General Goods Shops in Genshin Impact.
The exact ingredient requirements for cooking "Fine Tea, Full Moon" in Genshin Impact may change for each event re-run.
Go to any cooking station in Genshin Impact.
Open the cooking interface at the cooking station in Genshin Impact.
Select "Fine Tea, Full Moon" from the list of learned recipes in the cooking interface in Genshin Impact.
Cook "Fine Tea, Full Moon" manually for the first time in Genshin Impact to unlock the auto-cook option for this dish.

If the relevant limited-time event has already ended in Genshin Impact, it is not currently possible to obtain "Fine Tea, Full Moon" until the developers re-run the event or add the dish to a permanent source.
Punch trees in Minecraft to gather wood.
Convert wood logs into wooden planks using the basic 2x2 crafting grid in Minecraft.
Craft a crafting table using wooden planks in Minecraft.
Use the crafting table to craft a wooden pickaxe in Minecraft.
Find stone (cobblestone) in Minecraft by digging down or by locating an exposed rock face.
Mine at least 17 cobblestones in Minecraft, with 8 cobblestones for a furnace and 3 cobblestones for a stone pickaxe, and the remaining cobblestones available for other uses.
Continue mining underground or explore caves in Minecraft to find iron ore.
Obtain at least 3 iron ores in Minecraft so that you can craft a bucket.
Use cobblestone in Minecraft to craft a furnace.
Smelt iron ore in the furnace in Minecraft using wood planks, charcoal, or coal as fuel to obtain iron ingots.
Obtain at least 3 iron ingots in Minecraft to have enough material for crafting one bucket.
Use 3 iron ingots in Minecraft to craft a bucket.
Find a water source block in Minecraft, such as a river, lake, or spring.
Fill the bucket with water from the water source block in Minecraft.
Locate a pool of lava in Minecraft, either on the surface or underground.
Surface lava pools in Minecraft are ideal for Nether Portal construction because they often contain multiple lava source blocks.
Pour water from the bucket over a lava source block in Minecraft to create an obsidian block.
The lava used to create obsidian in Minecraft must be a lava source block rather than flowing lava.
Normally, a diamond pickaxe is required in Minecraft to mine obsidian blocks.
There is an alternative method in Minecraft to build a Nether Portal without mining the obsidian blocks.
In Minecraft, you need 10 obsidian blocks to build the smallest Nether Portal frame, which is 4 blocks tall and 5 blocks wide with the corner blocks optional.
Create a mold for the Nether Portal frame in Minecraft using dirt blocks or other temporary blocks.
Use the bucket in Minecraft to place lava inside the mold in the shape of the Nether Portal frame.
Pour water over the lava placed in the mold in Minecraft to create obsidian blocks in the correct Nether Portal frame shape.
Repeat the process of placing lava and pouring water in the mold in Minecraft until the entire Nether Portal frame is made of obsidian.
In Minecraft, flint and steel is required to ignite and activate a Nether Portal.
Mine gravel blocks in Minecraft until you obtain at least one piece of flint.
Obtain one iron ingot in Minecraft to use as the steel component for crafting flint and steel.
Craft flint and steel in Minecraft using one flint and one iron ingot.
Use the flint and steel in Minecraft to ignite one of the bottom obsidian blocks of the Nether Portal frame to activate the portal.
If you prefer to mine obsidian directly in Minecraft, you must first obtain and use a diamond pickaxe.
Diamonds in Minecraft are usually found deep underground near lava pools between Y-levels 5 and 16.
Stand inside the activated Nether Portal in Minecraft for a few seconds to be transported to the Nether dimension.

In Monster Hunter Generations, also known as Monster Hunter X or MHX in Japan, the Sharpness +1 skill increases the sharpness level of your weapon, allowing the weapon to deal more damage and bounce less often.

To activate the Sharpness +1 skill in Monster Hunter Generations, you must equip armor and decorations that have the Handicraft skill, which grants Handicraft points toward the activation of Sharpness +1.
Look for armor sets in Monster Hunter Generations that provide Handicraft points, such as the Nargacuga armor set and the Seregios armor set.
The Nargacuga armor set in Monster Hunter Generations is known for providing evasion-related skills but can be mixed with other armor pieces to achieve Handicraft points.
The Silver Sol armor set in Monster Hunter Generations provides Handicraft points and is a good choice for obtaining the Sharpness +1 skill if you have unlocked the Silver Sol armor set.
Mix and match armor pieces from different armor sets in Monster Hunter Generations to work toward activating the Sharpness +1 skill.

Look for individual armor pieces in Monster Hunter Generations that give Handicraft points and combine those armor pieces until your total Handicraft points reach at least +10, which is required to activate the Sharpness +1 skill.
Use decorations, also called gems, in Monster Hunter Generations that add Handicraft points to your equipped armor.
Craft Handicraft decorations, also called Handicraft gems, at the Smithy in Monster Hunter Generations by using materials obtained from hunting monsters.

Depending on your chosen armor set in Monster Hunter Generations, equip an appropriate combination of armor pieces and Handicraft decorations so that your total Handicraft points reach the +10 threshold required for activating Sharpness +1.

If you have access to good charms, also called talismans, in Monster Hunter Generations, equip a charm that provides Handicraft points to help you reach the required Handicraft amount for the Sharpness +1 skill.
Open the status screen in Monster Hunter Generations to view your current skill points.
On the status screen in Monster Hunter Generations, confirm that your Handicraft skill value is at least +10 to ensure that the Sharpness +1 skill is activated.
As you progress and unlock higher-rank quests in Monster Hunter Generations, additional armor options become available that can make it easier to achieve the Sharpness +1 skill.
Hunt different monsters in Monster Hunter Generations to gather the materials needed for crafting the armor pieces and Handicraft decorations required to obtain Sharpness +1.

Monster Hunter Generations often involves repeatedly hunting monsters to grind for materials, so you should continue hunting and upgrading your equipment as you progress toward obtaining the Sharpness +1 skill.
Gather Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Spider Eye, Fermented Spider Eye, Glowstone Dust, Dragon’s Breath, and a Brewing Stand.
Fermented Spider Eye is crafted with 1 Sugar, 1 Brown Mushroom, and 1 Spider Eye.
Place Blaze Powder into the fuel slot of the Brewing Stand.
Place Water Bottles into the three bottom slots of the Brewing Stand.
Place Nether Wart in the top slot of the Brewing Stand.
Wait until the Water Bottles in the Brewing Stand finish brewing and become Awkward Potions.
Placing a Spider Eye in the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Awkward Potions is an optional intermediate step to brew Potions of Poison.
You can skip brewing Potions of Poison if you are going directly to Potions of Harming by using a Fermented Spider Eye on Awkward Potions.
Put a Fermented Spider Eye into the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Awkward Potions.

Putting a Fermented Spider Eye into the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Awkward Potions will brew Potions of Harming (Instant Damage I) directly or convert existing Potions of Healing or Potions of Poison into Potions of Harming.
Place Glowstone Dust in the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Potions of Harming (Instant Damage I).
Brew the Potions of Harming (Instant Damage I) with Glowstone Dust until they become Potions of Harming II (Instant Damage II).
Place Dragon’s Breath in the top slot of the Brewing Stand over Splash Potions of Harming II.
Brew the Splash Potions of Harming II with Dragon’s Breath until they become Lingering Potions of Harming II.
If you only have normal, non-splash Potions of Harming II, first add Gunpowder in the Brewing Stand to convert the Potions of Harming II into Splash Potions of Harming II.

After converting normal Potions of Harming II to Splash Potions of Harming II with Gunpowder, add Dragon’s Breath in the Brewing Stand to convert the Splash Potions of Harming II into Lingering Potions of Harming II.

The full brewing order is: Water Bottle becomes Awkward Potion via Nether Wart, Awkward Potion becomes Potion of Harming I via Fermented Spider Eye, Potion of Harming I becomes Potion of Harming II via Glowstone Dust, Potion of Harming II becomes Splash Potion via Gunpowder, and Splash Potion becomes Lingering Potion via Dragon’s Breath.
Go to The Underworld, also called Hell, in Terraria.
Use a Guide Voodoo Doll to summon the Wall of Flesh by throwing the Guide Voodoo Doll into lava while the Guide NPC is alive.
Defeat the Wall of Flesh in Terraria to activate Hardmode in the world.
After entering Hardmode in Terraria, use a Pwnhammer, which is dropped by the Wall of Flesh, to smash at least one Demon Altar or Crimson Altar.
Each Demon Altar or Crimson Altar broken in a Hardmode Terraria world will spawn new Hardmode ores in that world.
Titanium Ore in Terraria has a chance to appear in the world only if you break three or more Demon Altars or Crimson Altars.
The first tier Hardmode ore in Terraria is either Cobalt or Palladium, depending on the world variant.
The second tier Hardmode ore in Terraria is either Mythril or Orichalcum, depending on the world variant.
The third tier Hardmode ore in Terraria is either Adamantite or Titanium, depending on the world variant.
Titanium Ore appears instead of Adamantite Ore in Terraria worlds that roll the Titanium variant for the third tier Hardmode ore.
Go deep underground to the Cavern layer in Terraria to search for Titanium Ore.
Look for shiny, silver-colored ore patches in the Cavern layer of Terraria, which indicate Titanium Ore.
Use a Mythril Pickaxe, an Orichalcum Pickaxe, or a higher-tier pickaxe in Terraria to mine Titanium Ore.
Collect Titanium Ore in Terraria and take the Titanium Ore to an Adamantite Forge or a Titanium Forge.
An Adamantite Forge or a Titanium Forge in Terraria is crafted by combining a Hellforge and 30 Adamantite Ore or 30 Titanium Ore at a Mythril Anvil or an Orichalcum Anvil.
Smelt Titanium Ore into Titanium Bars at an Adamantite Forge or a Titanium Forge in Terraria.
Go to a Mythril Anvil or an Orichalcum Anvil in Terraria.
Use 35 Titanium Bars at a Mythril Anvil or an Orichalcum Anvil in Terraria to craft the Titanium Sword, which is a broadsword and is also called Titanium Sword in the PC version of the game.
Centering text between two cells in Microsoft Excel without merging them can be achieved using the "Center Across Selection" feature.
Open the Microsoft Excel worksheet where you want to center the text.
Select the range of cells across which you want to center the text by clicking and dragging over the cells in Microsoft Excel.
For example, if you want to center the text between cells A1 and B1 in Microsoft Excel, select both cells A1 and B1.
Open the Format Cells dialog in Microsoft Excel by right-clicking on the selected cells and choosing "Format Cells" from the context menu.
Alternatively, open the Format Cells dialog in Microsoft Excel by going to the "Home" tab on the ribbon and clicking the small arrow in the bottom-right corner of the "Alignment" group.
In the Format Cells dialog box in Microsoft Excel, click on the "Alignment" tab.
In the "Horizontal" dropdown menu on the Alignment tab of the Format Cells dialog in Microsoft Excel, select "Center Across Selection".
Set the "Vertical" dropdown menu on the Alignment tab of the Format Cells dialog in Microsoft Excel to your desired vertical alignment, such as "Bottom", "Center", or "Top".
Click "OK" in the Format Cells dialog box in Microsoft Excel to apply the changes.
After applying the changes in Microsoft Excel, the text in the first cell of your selection will appear centered across the selected range of cells.
Check your Microsoft Excel worksheet to ensure that the text is centered across the selected cells.
When using "Center Across Selection" in Microsoft Excel, the cells remain separate and only the appearance of the text is centered.
Using "Center Across Selection" in Microsoft Excel allows you to visually center text without merging cells, preserving the functionality of individual cells for other data or calculations.
In BitLife, becoming a model involves starting a modeling career, getting elite gigs, attending auditions, and leveling up your modeling career.
Aim to have at least 90% Looks (Appearance) for your BitLife character from birth or plan to boost the Looks stat later.
Boost your BitLife character's Looks stat by using plastic surgery.
Plastic surgery in BitLife can be risky early in the game if you choose risky surgeons.
Boost your BitLife character's Looks stat by visiting the salon, applying makeup, or changing hair.
Boost your BitLife character's Looks stat by going to the gym and making healthy living choices.
Maintain high Health for your BitLife character by avoiding drugs, excessive alcohol, and risky choices.
You do not need to attend college in BitLife to become a professional model.
Ensure your BitLife character graduates from high school before starting a professional modeling career.
Ensure your BitLife character is at least 18 years old before starting professional modeling gigs.
Keep your BitLife character's Looks stat high during their teen years.
At age 18 in BitLife, open the Jobs menu, go to Special Careers, then Actor/Modeling, and apply for the Foot Model job.
If the Foot Model option does not appear in the BitLife Special Careers menu, age up your character and check the menu again.
The Foot Model role in BitLife is an entry-level modeling gig used to work hard and build experience.
As a Foot Model in BitLife, work hard each year to build experience.
Post on social media regularly in BitLife to grow followers and to maintain or increase your Fame.
Accept and perform photo shoots in BitLife when they are offered to increase your Fame.
Accept and perform commercials in BitLife when they are offered to increase your Fame.
Accept and perform runway events in BitLife when they are offered to increase your Fame.
When choosing activities in BitLife as a model, prioritize activities that increase public exposure.
After gaining some experience as a Foot Model in BitLife, you can unlock Catalog Model or Runway Model roles.
Apply for Catalog Model or Runway Model roles through Jobs, then Special Careers, then Model in BitLife until you are accepted.
Once you become a Famous Model in BitLife and the Fame bar is unlocked, you can hire an agent.
After becoming a Famous Model in BitLife, open the Fame menu and hire an agent.
Agents in BitLife can bring elite gigs such as high-paying fashion campaigns and magazine covers.
Elite modeling gigs in BitLife often require very high Looks, usually 95% or higher.
When your BitLife agent offers audition opportunities for luxury brands or runway shows, review these audition offers.
Always accept audition opportunities from your BitLife agent, even if you think you might fail.
In BitLife, having both high Looks and high Fame increases your success rate at auditions.
Work hard each year in your BitLife modeling job to improve your performance and keep your career stable.
Avoid taking too many years off from modeling in BitLife, because inactivity can hurt your Fame and income.
Continue boosting your BitLife character's Looks stat with surgery or cosmetic care if the Looks stat drops.
Once your Fame bar is full in BitLife, additional fame-based activities become available.
Once your Fame is full in BitLife, write books to increase your income and open more opportunities.
Once your Fame is full in BitLife, appear on TV talk shows to increase your income and open more opportunities.
Once your Fame is full in BitLife, accept sponsorship deals to increase your income and open more opportunities.
Writing books, doing TV talk shows, and getting sponsorship deals in BitLife boost your income and open more elite opportunities.
Models in BitLife can work for many years, but Fame drops after retirement unless you move into another fame-based career.
Save money during your BitLife modeling career to prepare for retirement.
After or near retirement in BitLife, consider branching into other celebrity roles such as acting or influencer careers to maintain your Fame.
There exists a possible min-max strategy in BitLife to become a famous model as early as age 18 without failed auditions.
Restart the PC and enter BIOS or UEFI by clicking Start, then Power, and then Restart while holding the Shift key.
After the PC restarts into the advanced startup menu, go to Troubleshoot, then Advanced options, and then UEFI Firmware Settings to enter the UEFI menu.
In the UEFI menu, look for a tab labeled Boot or a tab labeled Security.
In the Boot tab or Security tab of the UEFI menu, find the Secure Boot option.
Valorant's Vanguard anti-cheat system requires the PC to use UEFI boot mode and does not support Legacy or CSM boot mode.
If the Boot Mode setting in BIOS or UEFI is set to Legacy or CSM, change the Boot Mode setting to UEFI.
If you change the PC from Legacy boot mode to UEFI boot mode, you must ensure that the system drive uses GPT partition style; otherwise, Windows will not boot.
Set the Secure Boot option in BIOS or UEFI to Enabled.
If BIOS or UEFI provides a Secure Boot Mode option, choose the Standard or Default Secure Boot Mode.
Save the BIOS or UEFI changes by pressing the F10 key or by selecting the Save & Exit option in the BIOS or UEFI menu.
Confirm saving the BIOS or UEFI changes and allow the PC to reboot.
In Windows, press the Windows key and R together, type "msinfo32" into the Run dialog, and press Enter.
In the System Information window in Windows, look for the Secure Boot State entry and verify that its value is On.
If the Secure Boot option is grayed out in BIOS or UEFI, you may need to set the OS Type setting in BIOS or UEFI to Windows UEFI Mode first.
If you are switching the PC from Legacy boot mode to UEFI boot mode, you might need to convert the system drive from MBR partition style to GPT partition style before Windows will boot.
The procedure explains the optimal order to defeat all bosses in Hollow Knight from early-game to late-game to avoid unnecessary difficulty spikes and obtain upgrades before tackling harder fights.
The procedure goes through one boss at a time, explaining where to find each boss, what upgrades you should have, and key strategies for each boss in Hollow Knight.
The bosses in the procedure are ordered from the first easy encounters to the Pantheon bosses in Hollow Knight.
Fight the boss False Knight in Hollow Knight as an early step in the optimal boss order.
False Knight in Hollow Knight is located in the Forgotten Crossroads area.
The recommended gear for fighting False Knight in Hollow Knight is the base Nail, base health, and possibly one additional Mask Shard.
False Knight is placed early in the optimal order because it is a very early-game boss that teaches attack patterns without punishing mistakes too much.
When fighting False Knight in Hollow Knight, dodge the overhead slam attack by moving away from False Knight.
When fighting False Knight in Hollow Knight, when False Knight jumps, dash under False Knight once you have obtained the Mothwing Cloak dash ability.
When fighting False Knight in Hollow Knight, attack False Knight during the stagger phase to deal damage safely.
Fight the boss Gruz Mother in Hollow Knight as the next step in the optimal boss order.
Gruz Mother in Hollow Knight is located in the Forgotten Crossroads area.
The recommended gear for fighting Gruz Mother in Hollow Knight is the same as for False Knight, namely the base Nail, base health, and possibly one additional Mask Shard.
Gruz Mother is placed in the optimal order because it is a short fight that unlocks access to Sluglings and nearby charms in Hollow Knight.
When fighting Gruz Mother in Hollow Knight, stay under Gruz Mother’s belly to deal damage consistently.
When fighting Gruz Mother in Hollow Knight, move away when Gruz Mother slams down to avoid taking damage.
After Gruz Mother is defeated and bursts in Hollow Knight, deal with the small Gruzlings that appear by attacking them.
Fight the boss Vengefly King in Hollow Knight as a subsequent step in the optimal boss order.
Vengefly King in Hollow Knight is located in the Greenpath area.
The recommended gear for fighting Vengefly King in Hollow Knight is the basic Nail and four to five masks of health.
Vengefly King is placed in the optimal order because defeating Vengefly King unlocks a route to the character Zote and provides a minor early-game challenge in Hollow Knight.
When fighting Vengefly King in Hollow Knight, stay under and slightly behind Vengefly King to bait dive attacks.
When fighting Vengefly King in Hollow Knight, perform a jump-slash attack when Vengefly King dives to hit safely.
Fight the boss Hornet (Protector) in Hollow Knight as the next step in the optimal boss order.
Hornet (Protector) in Hollow Knight is located in the Greenpath area.
The recommended gear for fighting Hornet (Protector) in Hollow Knight is the Mothwing Cloak dash ability and four to five masks of health.
Hornet (Protector) is placed in the optimal order because defeating Hornet (Protector) grants the dash ability, which is needed for exploration and later bosses in Hollow Knight.
When fighting Hornet (Protector) in Hollow Knight, dash through Hornet’s needle throw attacks to avoid damage.
When fighting Hornet (Protector) in Hollow Knight, punish Hornet by attacking after she jumps over the player character.
When fighting Hornet (Protector) in Hollow Knight, watch for Hornet’s quick lunge move, which is preceded by a backstep and a vocal cue often transcribed as 'GOTCHA!', and be prepared to dodge it.
Fight the boss Massive Moss Charger in Hollow Knight as a further step in the optimal boss order.
Massive Moss Charger in Hollow Knight is located in a side area of the Greenpath region.
The recommended gear for fighting Massive Moss Charger in Hollow Knight is the dash ability.
Massive Moss Charger is placed in the optimal order because it is a very easy boss that provides more Geo and practice in dodging charge attacks in Hollow Knight.
When fighting Massive Moss Charger in Hollow Knight, jump over Massive Moss Charger’s charge attacks to avoid taking damage.
When fighting Massive Moss Charger in Hollow Knight, use down-slash attacks to land consistent hits while staying above the boss.
Fight the boss Mantis Lords in Hollow Knight as a key step in the optimal boss order.
The Mantis Lords in Hollow Knight are located in the Mantis Village area of the Fungal Wastes region.
The recommended gear for fighting the Mantis Lords in Hollow Knight is the dash ability, at least six masks of health, and possibly the Quick Focus charm or the Thorns of Agony charm.

The Mantis Lords are placed in the optimal order because defeating the Mantis Lords unlocks entry to the Deepnest area and provides one of the best early fights to master pattern recognition in Hollow Knight.
When fighting the Mantis Lords in Hollow Knight during phase one, focus on the single mantis with easy-to-read jumps and spear throws.
When fighting the Mantis Lords in Hollow Knight during phase two, when two mantises attack together, focus on movement and survival rather than taking greedy attacks.
The author of the procedure offers to continue listing bosses in optimal order up to the final fight with The Radiance in Hollow Knight, including optional bosses and Dream Boss upgrades.
The author of the procedure asks whether the reader wants to include all bosses including dream versions or only the main progression bosses in Hollow Knight.

The steps to connect a Nintendo Switch to a PC depend on whether you want to transfer screenshots or videos, use the Nintendo Switch as a controller for PC games, or stream and capture Nintendo Switch gameplay on a PC.
The following procedure explains how to show or record Nintendo Switch gameplay on a PC using a USB capture card.
Gather a Nintendo Switch with its dock.
Gather the Nintendo Switch dock’s HDMI cable.
Gather the Nintendo Switch dock’s AC power adapter.
Gather a USB capture card, such as an Elgato capture card or an AVerMedia capture card.
Gather a USB cable for the USB capture card.
Prepare the PC or laptop that will be connected to the USB capture card.
Put the Nintendo Switch into the Nintendo Switch dock.
Plug the AC power adapter into the Nintendo Switch dock and connect the AC power adapter to a wall outlet.
Plug one end of the HDMI cable into the HDMI OUT port of the Nintendo Switch dock.
Plug the other end of the HDMI cable into the HDMI IN port of the USB capture card.
If the USB capture card has an HDMI OUT port for TV passthrough, connect another HDMI cable from the HDMI OUT port of the USB capture card to a TV.
Connecting the HDMI OUT port of the USB capture card to a TV allows you to play Nintendo Switch games on the TV without delay.
Use the USB cable provided with the USB capture card to connect the USB capture card to the PC or laptop.
The PC or laptop should recognize the USB capture card as a video device.
Download and install the software for the USB capture card, such as Elgato Game Capture HD or OBS Studio, on the PC or laptop.
Launch the capture software on the PC or laptop and select the USB capture card as the video source.
After the setup is complete, the Nintendo Switch screen should appear in the capture software window on the PC or laptop.
Using the capture software on the PC or laptop, you can record Nintendo Switch gameplay, stream Nintendo Switch gameplay, or use the PC monitor to play Nintendo Switch games.
If you want to transfer files or use the Nintendo Switch as a controller for PC games, the steps are different from the capture-card-based procedure described here.
Familiarize yourself with the house layout in the game "Granny" and with the possible item spawn locations.
In the game "Granny," item locations are randomized in each game.
Obtain the Padlock Key, Master Key, Hammer, Pliers, Wrench, Wire Cutters, Wooden Stake, and the red and blue Cogwheels that are required to unlock the main door and escape in the game "Granny."
Use the Wire Cutters to disable the door alarm at the alarm control box located near the main door in the game "Granny."
Cut the wires in the basement to disable the electrical lock that helps secure the main door in the game "Granny."
Use the Hammer to remove the wooden planks from the main door in the game "Granny."
Use the Pliers to cut the wires in the basement and disable the electrical lock that helps secure the main door in the game "Granny."
Use the Padlock Key on the padlock attached to the main door in the game "Granny."
Use the Master Key to unlock the main door in the game "Granny" after all security measures on the door have been disabled.
Move stealthily and create noises intentionally to distract Granny and lure her away from your path to the main door in the game "Granny."
Avoid stepping on bear traps and creaking floors that can alert Granny to your location in the game "Granny."
After all required steps are complete and the main door in the game "Granny" is fully unlocked, exit through the main door to escape.
On Extreme mode in the game "Granny," Granny moves faster and the player needs to be much more cautious.
In the game "Granny," you can use hiding spots such as under beds and inside wardrobes to avoid being caught by Granny.
In the game "Granny," sound is a key element, and dropping items can distract Granny, but the player should ensure they are not nearby when dropping items.
Search for a reliable online gamertag generator, such as SpinXO, Namechk, or Gamertag Nation.
Open the chosen online gamertag generator tool in your web browser.

Select or enter keywords for the gamertag generator, such as your favorite animal, hobby, or an adjective.
Select a style for the gamertag in the gamertag generator, such as cool, funny, edgy, or fantasy.
Select a length limit for the gamertag in the gamertag generator, such as short or long.
Choose whether to include special characters or numbers in the gamertag in the gamertag generator.
Fill in the interests fields in the gamertag generator with information such as your gaming genre, favorite characters, or personality traits.
Fill in the numbers fields in the gamertag generator with information such as your birth year or lucky number.
Some gamertag generator tools allow you to leave sections blank if you want a completely random gamertag.
Click the Generate button in the gamertag generator tool.
The gamertag generator tool will create a list of gamertag suggestions based on the information you entered.
Review the list of generated gamertag names.
Choose a gamertag from the generated list that matches your style.
Ensure that the chosen gamertag is easy to remember.
Ensure that the chosen gamertag is not too hard to spell.
Many gamertag generators can check whether your chosen gamertag is available on platforms such as Xbox, PlayStation, or Steam.
Check whether your chosen gamertag is available on your desired gaming platforms using the gamertag generator or the platforms themselves.
If the chosen gamertag is unavailable, tweak the gamertag by adding numbers or symbols.
If the chosen gamertag is unavailable, tweak the gamertag by changing the spelling slightly.
Copy your final chosen gamertag to a safe place, such as a notes application or document.
Use your final chosen gamertag when signing up for a gaming account or changing your existing gamertag on your gaming platform.
The author of the instructions can provide a ready-made checklist so you can follow the steps easily whenever you use a gamertag generator.
Open Among Us by launching the game on your device, such as a PC, mobile device, or console.
Go to the main menu of Among Us, which appears as the home screen after the game finishes loading.
Open the settings menu in Among Us by clicking on the settings button on the main menu.
Select the "Data" tab inside the settings menu of Among Us.
Inside the settings menu of Among Us, there are different tabs such as General, Graphics, and Data.
Find the "Chat Type" option in the Data tab of the Among Us settings.
The "Chat Type" option in Among Us controls whether you use "Quick Chat only" or "Free or Quick Chat".
Change the Chat Type setting in Among Us to "Free or Quick Chat" by clicking the dropdown menu and selecting "Free or Quick Chat".
The "Quick Chat Only" option in Among Us restricts you to using only the preset chat wheel.
The "Free or Quick Chat" option in Among Us allows you to type messages freely while still giving access to Quick Chat.
Free Chat in Among Us is only available if your account age is set to 13 years old or older.
If your Among Us account age is set to under 13 years old, you cannot disable Quick Chat.
Log in to Among Us with an account that has the correct age of 13 years old or older if you need to change the age setting to enable Free Chat.
Save your changes by closing the settings menu in Among Us after you have changed the Chat Type option.
Split-screen mode in Fortnite only works on PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, and Xbox Series X/S.
Split-screen mode in Fortnite requires one TV or monitor because both players share the same screen.
In Fortnite split-screen mode, each player needs their own controller.
Turn on the PlayStation or Xbox console that will be used to play Fortnite in split-screen mode.
Launch Fortnite from the console’s library or home screen.
Log in to Player 1’s Epic Games account on Fortnite.
Wait until Player 1 is on the Fortnite Lobby screen after logging in.

Connecting a Nintendo Wii to a Smart TV can be done using different methods depending on the available inputs on the Smart TV and the cables you have.
The Nintendo Wii originally comes with a composite AV cable, which is the standard method for connecting to many older televisions.
Identify the Nintendo Wii composite AV cable, which has three RCA connectors: yellow for video, and red and white for left and right audio channels.
Locate the AV input section on the Smart TV, which is usually labeled as "AV," "Video In," or similar, and has yellow, red, and white ports.
Plug the yellow connector of the Nintendo Wii composite AV cable into the yellow video input on the Smart TV.
Plug the red connector of the Nintendo Wii composite AV cable into the red audio input on the Smart TV.
Plug the white connector of the Nintendo Wii composite AV cable into the white audio input on the Smart TV.
Use the Smart TV remote control to switch to the AV input channel, which is often labeled as "AV," "Video," or similar in the input or source menu.
Turn on the Nintendo Wii game console and start playing using the AV composite connection.
For better video quality than composite, you can use a component cable to connect the Nintendo Wii if the Smart TV supports component input.
Obtain a Nintendo Wii component cable, which has five connectors: red, blue, and green for video, and red and white for audio.
Locate the component inputs on the Smart TV, which are typically labeled as "Component," "YPbPr," or similar, and have red, blue, and green video ports and red and white audio ports.
Connect the red, blue, and green video connectors of the Nintendo Wii component cable to the corresponding red, blue, and green video inputs on the Smart TV.
Connect the red and white audio connectors of the Nintendo Wii component cable to the corresponding red and white audio inputs on the Smart TV.
Use the Smart TV remote control to switch to the component input channel.
Turn on the Nintendo Wii game console and, if needed, adjust the Nintendo Wii settings for component video output.
The Nintendo Wii does not have a native HDMI output, but you can use an adapter to convert the signal to HDMI.
Purchase a Nintendo Wii to HDMI adapter that plugs into the Nintendo Wii AV Multi Out port and provides an HDMI output.
Insert the Nintendo Wii to HDMI adapter into the AV Multi Out port on the Nintendo Wii console.
Plug one end of an HDMI cable into the HDMI output port on the Nintendo Wii to HDMI adapter.
Plug the other end of the HDMI cable into an available HDMI input port on the Smart TV.
Use the Smart TV remote control to switch to the HDMI input channel corresponding to the connected HDMI port.
Turn on the Nintendo Wii game console so that the HDMI connection provides a video and audio signal to the Smart TV.
In some regions, SCART connections may still be in use on older televisions.
Get a Nintendo Wii SCART adapter that connects to the Nintendo Wii AV composite cables and converts them into a SCART connection.
Connect the yellow, red, and white Nintendo Wii AV composite cables into the corresponding inputs on the Nintendo Wii SCART adapter.
Plug the Nintendo Wii SCART adapter into the SCART input on the television that has a SCART port.
Use the television remote control to switch to the SCART input channel.
Turn on the Nintendo Wii game console and begin playing using the SCART connection.
If the Smart TV supports S-Video and you have the appropriate Nintendo Wii S-Video cable, S-Video can be used as a connection option.
Acquire a Nintendo Wii S-Video cable, which offers separate video and audio connections.
Plug the S-Video connector of the Nintendo Wii S-Video cable into the S-Video input on the Smart TV.
Plug the red and white audio connectors of the Nintendo Wii S-Video cable into the corresponding red and white audio inputs on the Smart TV.
Use the Smart TV remote control to switch to the S-Video input channel.
Turn on the Nintendo Wii game console when using the S-Video connection.
Each connection method for the Nintendo Wii has its own advantages, and the best choice depends on the Smart TV’s available inputs and the desired video quality.
Component and HDMI connections generally provide better video quality than composite connections for the Nintendo Wii.
If you choose to use an adapter with the Nintendo Wii, make sure the adapter is compatible with the Smart TV setup.

Creating a powerful deck in Clash Royale requires balancing various card types and understanding your own playstyle and strategy.
Win condition cards in Clash Royale are the primary cards used to deal damage to your opponent's towers, such as Hog Rider, Royal Giant, and Balloon.
Support troop cards in Clash Royale assist your win condition cards by providing extra damage or protection, such as Musketeer, Wizard, and Electro Wizard.
Defensive cards in Clash Royale are used to counter enemy pushes and protect your towers, such as Cannon, Tesla, and Inferno Tower.
Spell cards in Clash Royale can be used for both offense and defense, clearing swarms or dealing chip damage, such as Fireball, Zap, and Arrows.
Cycle cards in Clash Royale are low-cost cards that help you cycle to your win condition cards faster, such as Skeletons, Ice Spirit, and Bats.
Tank cards in Clash Royale are high hitpoint units used to absorb damage, such as Golem, Giant, and P.E.K.K.A.
Select a primary win condition card in Clash Royale that suits your preferred playstyle, such as fast cycle decks, beatdown decks, or control decks.
Ensure that your Clash Royale deck is built around effectively supporting the selected primary win condition card.
Choose support troop cards in Clash Royale that complement your selected win condition card by protecting it and helping it push through enemy defenses.
Include at least two solid defensive cards in your Clash Royale deck to handle enemy pushes and to counter both air and ground units.

Choose two spell cards in Clash Royale that provide versatility, for example a heavy spell such as Fireball or Poison for dealing with medium-sized troops and a light spell such as Zap or Log for clearing swarms.
Ensure that the chosen spell cards in your Clash Royale deck can support both offensive and defensive plays.
Aim for an average elixir cost between 3.0 and 4.0 when building your Clash Royale deck to balance fast cycling with sufficient defensive and offensive power.
Make sure your Clash Royale deck is not too expensive in elixir so that you can still defend effectively against fast enemy pushes.
Use your Clash Royale deck in battles to evaluate its performance and identify weaknesses or underperforming cards.
Adjust your Clash Royale deck based on your observations by swapping out cards that do not fit well or are redundant.
Stay informed about the current Clash Royale meta, including which cards are popular or effective due to balance changes or trends.
Adjust your Clash Royale deck to counter popular strategies in the current meta and to keep it viable against top-tier decks.
Spend time practicing with your Clash Royale deck to master it and to understand its strengths and weaknesses.
By following these steps, you can create a powerful Clash Royale deck tailored to your playstyle and the current game environment.
Effective Clash Royale decks often result from experimentation and adaptation rather than a fixed card combination.
If a PlayStation 5 DualSense controller is flashing blue, it usually indicates that the DualSense controller is trying to pair with the PlayStation 5 console but is having trouble connecting.
Connect the DualSense controller to the PlayStation 5 console or to a USB power source using a USB-C cable to charge the DualSense controller.
Allow the DualSense controller to charge for a while to ensure the DualSense controller has enough power.
Hold the power button on the front of the PlayStation 5 console until the PlayStation 5 console beeps to turn the PlayStation 5 console off completely.
Disconnect the power cord from the PlayStation 5 console to ensure the PlayStation 5 console is completely off.
Leave the PlayStation 5 console unplugged for about 2 to 3 minutes to reset any temporary issues.
Reconnect the power cord to the PlayStation 5 console and turn the PlayStation 5 console back on.
Locate the reset button on the back of the DualSense controller in the small hole next to the Sony logo.
Use a small tool like a paperclip to press and hold the reset button inside the hole on the DualSense controller for about 5 seconds.
After resetting the DualSense controller, connect the DualSense controller to the PlayStation 5 console using the USB-C cable.
Press the PS button on the DualSense controller to pair the DualSense controller with the PlayStation 5 console.
Go to the PlayStation 5 settings menu.
In the PlayStation 5 settings menu, navigate to "System" then "System Software" then "System Software Update and Settings."
Ensure that the PlayStation 5 console is running the latest system software.
Sometimes, the DualSense controller itself may need a firmware update.
Follow the on-screen prompts if a DualSense controller firmware update is available when the DualSense controller is connected to the PlayStation 5 console.
Sometimes the issue with a flashing blue light on a DualSense controller may be caused by the USB-C cable used to connect the DualSense controller.
Try a different USB-C cable to connect the DualSense controller to the PlayStation 5 console.
If possible, try connecting the DualSense controller to another PlayStation 5 console or to a PC to see if the DualSense controller connects properly.
Testing the DualSense controller with another PlayStation 5 console or a PC can help determine whether the issue is with the DualSense controller or with the original PlayStation 5 console.
If none of the troubleshooting steps resolve the flashing blue light issue, the DualSense controller might have a hardware problem.
Contact PlayStation Support for further assistance or consider getting a replacement DualSense controller if the DualSense controller is still under warranty.
By following these troubleshooting steps, a user should be able to resolve the issue of a PlayStation 5 DualSense controller flashing blue in many cases.

Complete the Summer Foraging Bundle in the Crafts Room by collecting Spice Berry, Grape, and Sweet Pea and donating them to the bundle.
